titleStmt.title: SII 17.197: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 197. (A.R. No. 176 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
This inscription commences with Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara, etc., the praśasti of Rājēndra I.

It records a gift of sheep to the god at Tiruvakkarai in Tribhuvanamahādēvichaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, for burning a perpetual lamp by Veḷḷāḷaṉ Nandi Ēṟan, a resident of Śiraiyūr, a northern hamletof Tribhuvanamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayap pāvaiyum cirttani
ccelviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyil Iṭaiturai nāṭun tuṭarvanave
lip paṭar vanavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇarkkarumuraṇ ma
ṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyar tammuṭiyu māṅkavar teviya ro
ṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal tenṉavar vaitta cuntara muṭiyum I
n=tiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷa
ṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ce
ṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolpperuṅkāval pala paḻa
ntivum ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ
mel varuñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum
māppor taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāna śrīrājentracoḻa
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu brahmadeyam śrītribhuva
ṉamahaādeviccaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvakkarai śrīmulasthāna muṭaiya m(ā)hadevaṟku Ivūr vaṭa
piṭākaiciraiyūr Irukkum veḷḷāḷa ṉanti Eṟan vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu 1 kkum vaitta Ā
ṭu toṇṇūṟum mey Aṟak kaikkoṇṭu pāṭṭacceluttakkaṭavan
maṉṟāṭi Iṭaiyan
mukkaṉeṉ Itu
śvara
Irakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.197 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
